Package org.javalabs.jpa.ds

Class EternalDataSource

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.ds.EternalDataSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
CommonDataSource, ConnectionPoolDataSource
public class EternalDataSource extends Object implements ConnectionPoolDataSource
Internal data source.

Sudiptasish Chanda
